title: aster drummondii var. parviceps
intro: Aster drummondii var. parviceps, commonly known as Drummond's aster, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that help to soothe wounds, reduce pain, and combat infections. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and promoting digestive health. Aster drummondii var. parviceps can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salves and topical applications for skin issues.
